rules.headings: Tight letter spacing (tracking-tight), never Inter or standard sans. Use fluid scaling text-4xl to text-6xl maximum.
rules.body: Clean and legible, text-base on desktop, text-sm on mobile. Tracking normal to wide.

colors.rules: Avoid pure black. Tint backgrounds slightly blue/purple. Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast. Use 1px solid strokes or inner glows over soft shadows.

spacing_and_layout.system: Tailwind scale with generous spacing (p-4, p-6, p-8). Mobile-first responsive grids.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Rounded-3xl for cards (rounded-[1.5rem]), glassmorphism background (backdrop-blur-xl), 1px solid border with 10% white opacity.
spacing_and_layout.navigation: Floating bottom nav for mobile (fixed bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] glassmorphism border border-white/10 z-50), header sticky top-0 with glassmorphism.

components.buttons: Primary: Solid neon blue (#00F0FF) text on black background with neon blue border, or vice versa. Hover state: scale up slightly, increase glow. Fully rounded (rounded-full) for pills.
components.cards: Anonymous post cards: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-6. Time-remaining badge top right with neon text.
components.music_player: Sleek, waveform visualizer or minimal track bar. Large squared-off or slightly rounded cover art. 'Hug'/'Fug' reaction buttons with animated states and vibrant color fills on active.
components.modals: Shadcn Dialog with heavily customized glassmorphism styling, dark background overlay (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm).

motion.transitions: Smooth transitions on hover (transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease).
motion.interactions: Hover refract on glass cards, slight lift (-translate-y-1) and enhanced border glow on interactive elements.

image_urls.description: Pluto App Logo - minimalist glowing neon pluto planet graphic
Cosmic abstract neon blue and purple nebula for the landing page hero section background
Abstract swirling purple and blue music cover
Underground synthwave neon music album cover
Lo-fi chill mysterious album cover silhouette

media.rules: Ensure all images use object-cover, max-h-[80vh] on mobile. Images in post feeds should have rounded-2xl borders.

icons_and_libraries.ui_components: shadcn/ui for dialogs, tabs, select. Framer motion for animations.
icons_and_libraries.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-post-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first hybrid app with a floating bottom navigation bar containing links to Feed, Create Post, Music, and Profile/Settings.
Use Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon). Implement a dark-first UI with black/graphite backgrounds tinted slightly blue (#05050A).
Use 'Unbounded' font for headings and 'Outfit' for body.
The Feed should have topic filters (Crypto, Sports, Memes, Mental Health, Tell Anything, Stories, Confession, Music) displayed as horizontally scrollable pills.
Post cards must be glassmorphic (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10) with rounded-3xl corners.
Include a 'Time Remaining' badge on posts to indicate the 24h auto-delete feature.
In the Music page, use the provided cover images, implement an audio player layout, and 'Hug' / 'Fug' reaction buttons.
Use a Hidden Moderation Dashboard which matches the aesthetic but has denser data tables (Archetype 4 structural influence but with Archetype 7 colors).
Do NOT use Space Grotesk font. Do NOT use standard Shadcn card styles without customizing them to match the glassmorphic, rounded-3xl Gen Z aesthetic.
Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical grids where possible and generous padding.
Never use placeholder image URLs. Rely strictly on the images provided in this JSON.
Include a Landing Page highlighting the trending posts and the taglines: 'Post it. Let it vanish.' and 'Where lost thoughts land.'
Ensure all interactive elements have hover and focus states with proper contrast and 'data-testid' for testing.
